I say it jokingly just because it actually works through seven different but compounding pathways, meaning that they stack up on top of each other to help you burn more fat. So the seven weren't together to increase thermogenesis primarily and thermogenesis just means heat, thermogenesis, creation, right? So as you never had a fever and then in like in a week you lost like six pounds, right? While doing nothing but lying in bed. Why can't we do that all the time? I know, right? But if you remember when you had the flu, getting out of bed or going downstairs for like a maximum effort attempt, you were like wiped after that, right? And the reason that that happened to you is because when you're highly thermogenic, right? Because we had a fever, your thermogenic, if lots of heat that's getting created by your body, you become inefficient. And what this product does is it works through exact same pathways, but you don't need to get the flu to get the benefit, right? And so within the world of fat loss, efficiency is actually a bad thing. You want your body to be inefficient and have to work hard to do normal things. And this is what turns your metabolism from an efficient Prius to a gas-guzzling Ferrari at two miles a gallon, right? Except this time, instead of guzzling gas, you're guzzling your fat, right? And that's what your metabolism is doing and that's what you want it to do. So that's what these two products put together to do. Now I don't want you to get like scared by that term because it probably means nothing to you, but you may have noticed that some fat comes off more easily than others, right? The stubborn fat that most people describe for most guys is around your midsection. So usually it's stomach fat. That's for most guys. Some guys have it lower back. It's different. And for most women, it tends to be around your hip size and then back with the arms, okay? That fat has different alpha receptor concentrations, okay? And so it's higher alpha receptor concentrations. And what this like formulation does is it helps target and mobilize those stores. So if you have fat that is stored in a traditionally stubborn area, this will help you make a larger proportion of the fat come from those areas than it would otherwise.
